description: Schema fragment (_common.json). Merged into src/schema.json by src/schema/build.py. Do not load directly -- cross-fragment $ref uses '#/definitions/...' against the bundled output.

description.description: Free-form prose. Use a `|` literal block for multi-line text.

var.description: Reference to a `:global` declared in secrets.yaml / vars.yaml. Renders as `$NAME`. Prefer the `$NAME` shorthand in plain values.

expr.description: RouterOS bracket expression (without surrounding `[ ]` -- the converter restores them). Renders as `[EXPR]`. Prefer the `$(EXPR)` shorthand in plain values.

iacTokenList.description: One or more `iac.*` tokens, comma-separated. A leading `!` (RouterOS negation) is allowed per token.

vlanId.description: A single 802.1Q VLAN id in the inclusive range 1..4094. Example: `100`.

vlanIdList.description: Single VLAN id (1-4094) or comma/range-separated list (e.g. `10,20,30` or `10-30`).

port.description: Port number, list (`53,67`), range (`1000-2000`), or named service.

ipv4Address.description: A bare IPv4 address in dotted-quad form, no mask. Example: `192.168.88.1`.

ipv4Cidr.description: An IPv4 address with optional `/prefix`. Example: `192.168.88.1/24`.

ipv4OrCidrOrList.description: An IPv4 address, CIDR, range, or comma-separated list thereof. Accepts `$NAME` shorthand for `:global` substitution.

ipv6Address.description: A bare IPv6 address, no prefix. Example: `2001:db8::1`.

ipv6Cidr.description: An IPv6 address with optional `/prefix-length`. Example: `2001:db8::/64`.
